title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 17-A.  LOUISIANA HOME

INSPECTOR LICENSING LAW

§1471.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Home Inspectors Licensing Law".

Acts 1999, No. 61, §2.
